text: Keep your face to the sunshine and you cannot see a shadow.
author: Helen Keller

text: Once you replace negative thoughts with positive ones, you'll start having positive results.
author: Willie Nelson

text: Positive thinking will let you do everything better than negative thinking will.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: The only time you fail is when you fall down and stay down.
author: Stephen Richards

text: You cannot have a positive life and a negative mind.
author: Joyce Meyer

text: Optimism is the faith that leads to achievement. Nothing can be done without hope and confidence.
author: Helen Keller

text: Write it on your heart that every day is the best day in the year.
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

text: A positive attitude causes a chain reaction of positive thoughts, events and outcomes.
author: Wade Boggs

text: Turn your face toward the sun and the shadows will fall behind you.
author: Maori Proverb

text: In every day, there are 1,440 minutes. That means we have 1,440 daily opportunities to make a positive impact.
author: Les Brown

text: Believe good things will happen and they will.
author: Anonymous

text: No matter what you're going through, there's a light at the end of the tunnel.
author: Demi Lovato

text: When you are enthusiastic about what you do, you feel this positive energy. It's very simple.
author: Paulo Coelho

text: Perpetual optimism is a force multiplier.
author: Colin Powell

text: If you look the right way, you can see that the whole world is a garden.
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett

text: Be the positive energy you want to absorb.
author: Anonymous

text: Positive anything is better than negative nothing.
author: Elbert Hubbard

text: Every day may not be good... but there's something good in every day.
author: Alice Morse Earle

text: You are the master of your destiny. You can influence, direct and control your own environment.
author: Napoleon Hill

text: Surround yourself with positive people who believe in your dreams.
author: Roy T. Bennett

text: Optimism is a happiness magnet. If you stay positive, good things and good people will be drawn to you.
author: Mary Lou Retton

text: An attitude of positive expectation is the mark of the superior personality.
author: Brian Tracy

text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
author: Buddha

text: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

text: A positive attitude can really make dreams come true—it did for me.
author: David Bailey

text: Train your mind to see the good in every situation.
author: Anonymous

text: When you wake up every day, you have two choices. You can either be positive or negative; an optimist or a pessimist. I choose to be an optimist.
author: Harvey Mackay

text: Wherever you go, no matter what the weather, always bring your own sunshine.
author: Anthony J. D'Angelo

text: The difference between an obstacle and an opportunity is our attitude toward it.
author: J. Sidlow Baxter

text: Always look on the bright side of things. If they are not bright, make them shine.
author: Anonymous

text: Work hard, stay positive, and get up early. It's the best part of the day.
author: George Allen, Sr.

text: Positive mind. Positive vibes. Positive life.
author: Anonymous

text: Even the darkest night will end and the sun will rise.
author: Victor Hugo

text: Do good and good will come to you.
author: Adam Lowy

text: Every sunrise gives you a new beginning and a new ending. Let this morning be a new beginning to a better relationship and a new ending to the bad memories.
author: Norton Juster

text: In order to carry a positive action we must develop here a positive vision.
author: Dalai Lama

text: Your smile will give you a positive countenance that will make people feel comfortable around you.
author: Les Brown

text: Be mindful. Be grateful. Be positive. Be true. Be kind.
author: Roy T. Bennett

text: Optimism is essential to achievement and it is also the foundation of courage and true progress.
author: Nicholas M. Butler

text: Think big, believe big, act big, and the results will be big.
author: Anonymous
